title: quadlet: add `cat` alias for `print`
body:
Add new alias `podman quadlet cat` to `podman quadlet print` to align Podman's quadlet CLI with systemd conventions.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/27296

#### Tests

I tried my best to find proper test for `quadlet print` 😅 . I am not sure if changed bats file in the commit is correct, can you please double check?

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Added `podman quadlet cat` alias for `podman quadlet print`
```
